Hi, I'm Rohit.

for creators.

I'm not a generic chatbot builder. I build complete, production-grade AI platforms that turn your audience into paying subscribers — with real voice AI, real payment infrastructure, and real analytics.

Every project is built from scratch to match your brand, your audience psychology, and your revenue goals. When you book a call with me, you get a clear blueprint — no fluff, no templates, no BS.

What I Build

Every Feature Your
Audience Needs

chatbot.config.ts
// AI Influencer Platform
const platform = {
  model: "gpt-4o",
  voice: "elevenlabs",
  revenue: {
    subs: true,
    credits: true,
    premium: true,
  },
  pay: ["stripe","razorpay"],
}
// → Live in 72hrs
01 — Core
Real-Time AI Chat
AI trained on your content, personality, tone. Fans feel like they're talking to the real you — at scale, 24/7.
02 — Revenue
Subscription + Credits
Recurring plans (daily/weekly/monthly/yearly) + pay-per-use credits. Stripe & Razorpay wired in from day one.
03 — Immersive
Voice AI + Phone Calls
ElevenLabs-powered voice replies and AI phone calls. The most immersive fan experience available anywhere.
04 — Intelligence
Analytics Dashboard
Revenue by stream, user retention, credit spend, subscription churn — full owner intelligence in real-time.
05 — Premium
Content Unlock System
Gate exclusive videos, collabs, personalized messages behind premium tiers. Layered monetization architecture.
06 — Social
Social Media Integration
Connect Instagram, YouTube, TikTok. AI syncs with your latest content and announcements automatically.

How It Works

Idea → Revenue
in 4 Steps

01
Discovery Call
Map niche, audience psychology, revenue goals. Define AI personality and full feature scope.
02
Design Sprint
Custom UI built to your aesthetic. Dark luxury, neon, pastel — pixel-perfect brand match.
03
Build & Train
AI trained on your content. Payments wired. Dashboard live. Voice enabled. Everything tested.
04
Launch & Scale
Custom domain. Going live. I maintain and optimize so your revenue compounds every month.
